title: Implement a feeding plan for pig production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a feeding plan for pig production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare feeding plan and resources

pcs.text: Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site.

pcs.text: Determine feed quantities required from the production program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine feed quantities required from the production program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine feed quantities required from the production program.

pcs.text: Use relevant laboratory results when determining quantities and ration formulation of stockfeed in consultation with nutritionist
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use relevant laboratory results when determining quantities and ration formulation of stockfeed in consultation with nutritionist?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use relevant laboratory results when determining quantities and ration formulation of stockfeed in consultation with nutritionist.

pcs.text: Schedule and allocate responsibility for feeding according to production program and other relevant operational requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule and allocate responsibility for feeding according to production program and other relevant operational requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule and allocate responsibility for feeding according to production program and other relevant operational requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor and ensure feed systems are maintained regularly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and ensure feed systems are maintained regularly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and ensure feed systems are maintained regularly.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare feeding plan and resources

elements.title: Manage storage of feed

pcs.text: Develop a plan for secure and hygienic storage of feed according to enterprise biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a plan for secure and hygienic storage of feed according to enterprise biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a plan for secure and hygienic storage of feed according to enterprise biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Allocate and monitor feed storage areas to meet enterprise hygiene, production and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allocate and monitor feed storage areas to meet enterprise hygiene, production and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate and monitor feed storage areas to meet enterprise hygiene, production and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Organise rotation and replenishment of feed supplies to maximise quality and meet quantities required for production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise rotation and replenishment of feed supplies to maximise quality and meet quantities required for production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise rotation and replenishment of feed supplies to maximise quality and meet quantities required for production.

pcs.text: Schedule pig feeding times according to their nutritional needs and enterprise equipment resources available
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule pig feeding times according to their nutritional needs and enterprise equipment resources available?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule pig feeding times according to their nutritional needs and enterprise equipment resources available.

pcs.text: Supervise calibration of feeding equipment and calculation of feed quantities to meet pig nutritional requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise calibration of feeding equipment and calculation of feed quantities to meet pig nutritional requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise calibration of feeding equipment and calculation of feed quantities to meet pig nutritional requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manage storage of feed

elements.title: Supervise feeding

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards to team members and pigs related to pig feeding tasks, and assess and control risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards to team members and pigs related to pig feeding tasks, and assess and control risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards to team members and pigs related to pig feeding tasks, and assess and control risks.

pcs.text: Check appropriate personal protective equipment is maintained and used by team members according to enterprise health, safety and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check appropriate personal protective equipment is maintained and used by team members according to enterprise health, safety and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check appropriate personal protective equipment is maintained and used by team members according to enterprise health, safety and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure that feed rations are supplied to pigs and recorded according to feeding plan requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that feed rations are supplied to pigs and recorded according to feeding plan requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that feed rations are supplied to pigs and recorded according to feeding plan requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure continuous supplies of potable water are available to pigs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure continuous supplies of potable water are available to pigs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure continuous supplies of potable water are available to pigs.

pcs.text: Provide pig feeding advice to team members as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide pig feeding advice to team members as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide pig feeding advice to team members as required.

pcs.text: Monitor and supervise pig feeding to minimise waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and supervise pig feeding to minimise waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and supervise pig feeding to minimise waste.

pcs.text: Monitor and record pig health and condition in response to pig feeding plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and record pig health and condition in response to pig feeding plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and record pig health and condition in response to pig feeding plan.

pcs.text: Evaluate and report implementation of feeding plan and related pig health and production outcomes according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate and report implementation of feeding plan and related pig health and production outcomes according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate and report implementation of feeding plan and related pig health and production outcomes according to enterprise procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Supervise feeding

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
